quoted_text:
China, Europe & Japan LNG imports YTD thru June 28.

China -0.53 bcf/d YoY to 6.80 bcf/d. The key China LNG story for the past five years or so has been  China higher domestic #NatGas production = lower China #LNG imports.

Europe +0.03 bcf/d YoY to 16.97 bcf/d.

Japan: -0.36 bcf/d YoY to 7.73 bcf/d.

Thx @BloombergNEF
